title: Interlock in 200 Parts
artist_persona: An artist working at the intersection of architecture and abstract geometry
description: A precision-crafted geometric study that echoes the Mid Century Modern-inspired architecture of the space. Intersecting planes in #80695c, #674d3e, and #a79280 create depth that draws the eye across the 200cm width. The refined contrast relates to the room's medium lighting, while the compositional rhythm mirrors the 1.05 proportion of vertical to horizontal lines in the room.
artwork_rationale: This piece responds to the room's Mid Century Modern architecture (high confidence) with its refined composition. The intimately scaled ceiling (3.4m) and natural even lighting conditions informed the scale and contrast. At 3.8m viewing distance, the large statement format fills the optimal field of view.
color_rationale: The palette draws from the room's dominant #80695c and accent #674d3e tones, ensuring mixed harmony with the existing warm interior. The low vibrancy level matches the room's quiet, understated character.
image_prompt: A high-end digital artwork titled 'Interlock in 200 Parts', large statement format. A precision-crafted geometric study that echoes the Mid Century Modern-inspired architecture of the space. Intersecting planes in #80695c, #674d3e, and #a79280 create depth that draws the eye across the 200cm width. The refined contrast relates to the room's medium lighting, while the compositional rhythm mirrors the 1.05 proportion of vertical to horizontal lines in the room. The piece is museum-quality, suitable for a luxury interior. Color palette centered on #80695c with #674d3e accents. Style: structured elegant. The artwork should feel like a commissioned gallery piece — not generic, not templated, but intentionally made for this specific room with Mid Century Modern architecture.

recommended_frame.description: A slim black steel channel frame — nearly invisible — that lets the geometric composition speak directly to the wall. Mounted on a cleat system for perfect alignment.

recommended_lighting.description: An ultra-thin linear LED strip mounted behind the frame's top edge, casting a soft wash down the surface. 3500K for crisp geometric clarity.

recommended_placement: Secondary wall or above a console table, smaller scale as an accent counterpoint
